verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit autem Dominus ad Abram : Egredere de terra tua, et de cognatione tua, et de domo patris tui, et veni in terram quam monstrabo tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־אַבְרָ֔ם לֶךְ־לְךָ֛ מֵאַרְצְךָ֥ וּמִמּֽוֹלַדְתְּךָ֖ וּמִבֵּ֣ית אָבִ֑יךָ אֶל־הָאָ֖רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֥ר אַרְאֶֽךָּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Abram: Go forth out of thy country, and from thy kindred, and out of thy father's house, and come into the land which I shall shew thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra oli sanonut Abramille: Lähde maaltas, ja suvustas, ja isäs huoneesta: sille maalle, jonka minä sinulle osoitan.
verses.king_james: Now the Lord had said unto Abram, Get thee out of thy country, and from thy kindred, and from thy father’s house, unto a land that I will shew thee:

verses.latin_vulgate: Faciamque te in gentem magnam, et benedicam tibi, et magnificabo nomen tuum, erisque benedictus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶֽעֶשְׂךָ֙ לְג֣וֹי גָּד֔וֹל וַאֲבָ֣רֶכְךָ֔ וַאֲגַדְּלָ֖ה שְׁמֶ֑ךָ וֶהְיֵ֖ה בְּרָכָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will make of thee a great nation, and I will bless thee, and magnify thy name, and thou shalt be blessed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä teen sinun suureksi kansaksi, ja siunaan sinun, ja teen sinulle suuren nimen, ja sinä olet siunaus.
verses.king_james: And I will make of thee a great nation, and I will bless thee, and make thy name great; and thou shalt be a blessing:

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedicam benedicentibus tibi, et maledicam maledicentibus tibi, atque in te benedicentur universæ cognationes terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲבָֽרְכָה֙ מְבָ֣רְכֶ֔יךָ וּמְקַלֶּלְךָ֖ אָאֹ֑ר וְנִבְרְכ֣וּ בְךָ֔ כֹּ֖ל מִשְׁפְּחֹ֥ת הָאֲדָמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will bless them that bless thee, and curse them that curse thee, and IN THEE shall all the kindreds of the earth be blessed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä siunaan niitä, jotka sinua siunaavat, ja kiroon niitä, jotka sinua kiroovat. Ja sinussa pitää kaikki sukukunnat maan päällä siunatuiksi tuleman.
verses.king_james: And I will bless them that bless thee, and curse him that curseth thee: and in thee shall all families of the earth be blessed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressus est itaque Abram sicut præceperat ei Dominus, et ivit cum eo Lot : septuaginta quinque annorum erat Abram cum egrederetur de Haran.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֣לֶךְ אַבְרָ֗ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבֶּ֤ר אֵלָיו֙ יְהֹוָ֔ה וַיֵּ֥לֶךְ אִתּ֖וֹ ל֑וֹט וְאַבְרָ֗ם בֶּן־חָמֵ֤שׁ שָׁנִים֙ וְשִׁבְעִ֣ים שָׁנָ֔ה בְּצֵאת֖וֹ מֵחָרָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Abram went out as the Lord had commanded him, and Lot went with him: Abram was seventy-five years old when he went forth from Haran.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Abram läksi, niinkuin Herra hänelle sanonut oli, ja Lot meni hänen kanssansa: Mutta Abram oli viidenkahdeksattakymmentä ajastajan vanha Haranista lähteissänsä.
verses.king_james: So Abram departed, as the Lord had spoken unto him; and Lot went with him: and Abram was seventy and five years old when he departed out of Haran.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tulitque Sarai uxorem suam, et Lot filium fratris sui, universamque substantiam quam possederant, et animas quas fecerant in Haran : et egressi sunt ut irent in terram Chanaan. Cumque venissent in eam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֣ח אַבְרָם֩ אֶת־שָׂרַ֨י אִשְׁתּ֜וֹ וְאֶת־ל֣וֹט בֶּן־אָחִ֗יו וְאֶת־כׇּל־רְכוּשָׁם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר רָכָ֔שׁוּ וְאֶת־הַנֶּ֖פֶשׁ אֲשֶׁר־עָשׂ֣וּ בְחָרָ֑ן וַיֵּצְא֗וּ לָלֶ֙כֶת֙ אַ֣רְצָה כְּנַ֔עַן וַיָּבֹ֖אוּ אַ֥רְצָה כְּנָֽעַן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he took Sarai his wife, and Lot his brother's son, and all the substance which they had gathered, and the souls which they had gotten in Haran: and they went out to go into the land of Chanaan. And when they were come into it,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin otti Abram emäntänsä Sarain, ja Lotin, veljensä pojan, tavaroinensa, jotka he olivat panneet kokoon, ja sielut, jotka he olivat saaneet Haranissa, ja läksivät matkustamaan Kanaanin maalle; tulivat myös Kanaanin maalle.
verses.king_james: And Abram took Sarai his wife, and Lot his brother’s son, and all their substance that they had gathered, and the souls that they had gotten in Haran; and they went forth to go into the land of Canaan; and into the land of Canaan they came.

verses.latin_vulgate: pertransivit Abram terram usque ad locum Sichem, usque ad convallem illustrem : Chananæus autem tunc erat in terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲבֹ֤ר אַבְרָם֙ בָּאָ֔רֶץ עַ֚ד מְק֣וֹם שְׁכֶ֔ם עַ֖ד אֵל֣וֹן מוֹרֶ֑ה וְהַֽכְּנַעֲנִ֖י אָ֥ז בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Abram passed through the country unto the place of Sichem, as far as the noble vale: now the Chanaanite was at that time in the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abram vaelsi sen maakunnan lävitse, hamaan Sikemin paikkakuntaan, Moren lakeuteen asti. Ja siihen aikaan asuivat Kanaanealaiset maalla.
verses.king_james: And Abram passed through the land unto the place of Sichem, unto the plain of Moreh. And the Canaanite was then in the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Apparuit autem Dominus Abram, et dixit ei : Semini tuo dabo terram hanc. Qui ædificavit ibi altare Domino, qui apparuerat ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּרָ֤א יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־אַבְרָ֔ם וַיֹּ֕אמֶר לְזַ֨רְעֲךָ֔ אֶתֵּ֖ן אֶת־הָאָ֣רֶץ הַזֹּ֑את וַיִּ֤בֶן שָׁם֙ מִזְבֵּ֔חַ לַיהֹוָ֖ה הַנִּרְאֶ֥ה אֵלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord appeared to Abram, and said to him: To thy seed will I give this land. And he built there an altar to the Lord, who had appeared to him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin näkyi Herra Abramille, ja sanoi: sinun siemenelles annan minä tämän maan. Ja hän rakensi siinä alttarin Herralle, joka hänelle näkynyt oli.
verses.king_james: And the Lord appeared unto Abram, and said, Unto thy seed will I give this land: and there builded he an altar unto the Lord, who appeared unto him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et inde transgrediens ad montem, qui erat contra orientem Bethel, tetendit ibi tabernaculum suum, ab occidente habens Bethel, et ab oriente Hai : ædificavit quoque ibi altare Domino, et invocavit nomen ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעְתֵּ֨ק מִשָּׁ֜ם הָהָ֗רָה מִקֶּ֛דֶם לְבֵֽית־אֵ֖ל וַיֵּ֣ט אׇהֳלֹ֑ה בֵּֽית־אֵ֤ל מִיָּם֙ וְהָעַ֣י מִקֶּ֔דֶם וַיִּֽבֶן־שָׁ֤ם מִזְבֵּ֙חַ֙ לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה וַיִּקְרָ֖א בְּשֵׁ֥ם יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And passing on from thence to a mountain, that was on the east side of Bethel, he there pitched his tent, having Bethel on the west, and Hai on the east: he built there also an altar to the Lord, and called upon his name.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte siirsi hän itsensä edemmä vuoren tykö, BetElistä itään päin, ja pani siihen majansa, niin että BetEl oli lännen puolella ja Ai idän puolella, ja rakensi siinä alttarin Herralle, ja saarnasi Herran nimestä.
verses.king_james: And he removed from thence unto a mountain on the east of Beth–el, and pitched his tent, having Beth–el on the west, and Hai on the east: and there he builded an altar unto the Lord, and called upon the name of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Perrexitque Abram vadens, et ultra progrediens ad meridiem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסַּ֣ע אַבְרָ֔ם הָל֥וֹךְ וְנָס֖וֹעַ הַנֶּֽגְבָּה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Abram went forward, going and proceeding on to the south.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abram läksi sieltä edemmä, ja vaelsi etelään päin.
verses.king_james: And Abram journeyed, going on still toward the south.

verses.latin_vulgate: Facta est autem fames in terra : descenditque Abram in Ægyptum, ut peregrinaretur ibi : prævaluerat enim fames in terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י רָעָ֖ב בָּאָ֑רֶץ וַיֵּ֨רֶד אַבְרָ֤ם מִצְרַ֙יְמָה֙ לָג֣וּר שָׁ֔ם כִּֽי־כָבֵ֥ד הָרָעָ֖ב בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there came a famine in the country: and Abram went down into Egypt, to sojourn there: for the famine was very grievous in the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tuli kova aika maalle, ja Abram meni alas Egyptiin, olemaan muukalaisna siellä: sillä sangen kova aika oli maalla.
verses.king_james: And there was a famine in the land: and Abram went down into Egypt to sojourn there; for the famine was grievous in the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque prope esset ut ingrederetur Ægyptum, dixit Sarai uxori suæ : Novi quod pulchra sis mulier :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֕י כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר הִקְרִ֖יב לָב֣וֹא מִצְרָ֑יְמָה וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ אֶל־שָׂרַ֣י אִשְׁתּ֔וֹ הִנֵּה־נָ֣א יָדַ֔עְתִּי כִּ֛י אִשָּׁ֥ה יְפַת־מַרְאֶ֖ה אָֽתְּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he was near to enter into Egypt, he said to Sarai his wife: I know that thou art a beautiful woman:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui, koska hän lähestyi Egyptiä, puhui hän emännällensä Saraille: katso armaani, minä tiedän sinun ihanaksi vaimoksi nähdä.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when he was come near to enter into Egypt, that he said unto Sarai his wife, Behold now, I know that thou art a fair woman to look upon:

verses.latin_vulgate: et quod cum viderint te Ægyptii, dicturi sunt : Uxor ipsius est : et interficient me, et te reservabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה כִּֽי־יִרְא֤וּ אֹתָךְ֙ הַמִּצְרִ֔ים וְאָמְר֖וּ אִשְׁתּ֣וֹ זֹ֑את וְהָרְג֥וּ אֹתִ֖י וְאֹתָ֥ךְ יְחַיּֽוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And that when the Egyptians shall see thee, they will say: She is his wife: and they will kill me, and keep thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska Egyptiläiset saavat sinun nähdä, niin he sanovat: tämä on hänen emäntänsä, ja tappavat minun, ja antavat sinun elää.
verses.king_james: Therefore it shall come to pass, when the Egyptians shall see thee, that they shall say, This is his wife: and they will kill me, but they will save thee alive.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dic ergo, obsecro te, quod soror mea sis : ut bene sit mihi propter te, et vivat anima mea ob gratiam tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִמְרִי־נָ֖א אֲחֹ֣תִי אָ֑תְּ לְמַ֙עַן֙ יִֽיטַב־לִ֣י בַעֲבוּרֵ֔ךְ וְחָיְתָ֥ה נַפְשִׁ֖י בִּגְלָלֵֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Say, therefore, I pray thee, that thou art my sister: that I may be well used for thee, and that my soul may live for thy sake.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sanos siis itses minun sisarekseni; että minulle hyvin olis sinun tähtes, ja minä eläisin sinun vuokses.
verses.king_james: Say, I pray thee, thou art my sister: that it may be well with me for thy sake; and my soul shall live because of thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum itaque ingressus esset Abram Ægyptum, viderunt Ægyptii mulierem quod esset pulchra nimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֕י כְּב֥וֹא אַבְרָ֖ם מִצְרָ֑יְמָה וַיִּרְא֤וּ הַמִּצְרִים֙ אֶת־הָ֣אִשָּׁ֔ה כִּֽי־יָפָ֥ה הִ֖וא מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Abram was come into Egypt, the Egyptians saw the woman that she was very beautiful.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska Abram tuli Egyptiin, näkivät Egyptiläiset vaimon juuri ihanaksi.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, that, when Abram was come into Egypt, the Egyptians beheld the woman that she was very fair.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nuntiaverunt principes Pharaoni, et laudaverunt eam apud illum : et sublata est mulier in domum Pharaonis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּרְא֤וּ אֹתָהּ֙ שָׂרֵ֣י פַרְעֹ֔ה וַיְהַֽלְל֥וּ אֹתָ֖הּ אֶל־פַּרְעֹ֑ה וַתֻּקַּ֥ח הָאִשָּׁ֖ה בֵּ֥ית פַּרְעֹֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the princes told Pharao, and praised her before him: and the woman was taken into the house of Pharao.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Pharaon ruhtinaat näkivät hänen, ja ylistivät häntä Pharaon edessä: silloin vietiin vaimo Pharaon huoneeseen.
verses.king_james: The princes also of Pharaoh saw her, and commended her before Pharaoh: and the woman was taken into Pharaoh’s house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abram vero bene usi sunt propter illam : fueruntque ei oves et boves et asini, et servi et famulæ, et asinæ et cameli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְאַבְרָ֥ם הֵיטִ֖יב בַּעֲבוּרָ֑הּ וַֽיְהִי־ל֤וֹ צֹאן־וּבָקָר֙ וַחֲמֹרִ֔ים וַעֲבָדִים֙ וּשְׁפָחֹ֔ת וַאֲתֹנֹ֖ת וּגְמַלִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they used Abram well for her sake. And he had sheep and oxen and he asses, and men servants, and maid servants, and she asses, and camels.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abramille tehtiin hyvin hänen tähtensä. Ja hänellä oli lampaita ja karjaa, ja aaseja, ja palvelioita, ja piikoja, ja aasintammoja ja kameleja.
verses.king_james: And he entreated Abram well for her sake: and he had sheep, and oxen, and he asses, and menservants, and maidservants, and she asses, and camels.

verses.latin_vulgate: Flagellavit autem Dominus Pharaonem plagis maximis, et domum ejus, propter Sarai uxorem Abram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְנַגַּ֨ע יְהֹוָ֧ה ׀ אֶת־פַּרְעֹ֛ה נְגָעִ֥ים גְּדֹלִ֖ים וְאֶת־בֵּית֑וֹ עַל־דְּבַ֥ר שָׂרַ֖י אֵ֥שֶׁת אַבְרָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the Lord scourged Pharao and his house with most grievous stripes for Sarai, Abram's wife.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herra vitsasi Pharaota suurilla vitsauksilla, ja hänen huonettansa, Sarain Abramin emännän tähden.
verses.king_james: And the Lord plagued Pharaoh and his house with great plagues because of Sarai Abram’s wife.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vocavitque Pharao Abram, et dixit ei : Quidnam est hoc quod fecisti mihi ? quare non indicasti quod uxor tua esset ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֤א פַרְעֹה֙ לְאַבְרָ֔ם וַיֹּ֕אמֶר מַה־זֹּ֖את עָשִׂ֣יתָ לִּ֑י לָ֚מָּה לֹא־הִגַּ֣דְתָּ לִּ֔י כִּ֥י אִשְׁתְּךָ֖ הִֽוא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Pharao called Abram, and said to him: What is this that thou hast done to me? Why didst thou not tell me that she was thy wife?
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin kutsui Pharao Abramin tykönsä, ja sanoi: miksis tämän minulle teit? miksi et ilmoittanut minulle häntä emännäkses?
verses.king_james: And Pharaoh called Abram, and said, What is this that thou hast done unto me? why didst thou not tell me that she was thy wife?

verses.latin_vulgate: quam ob causam dixisti esse sororem tuam, ut tollerem eam mihi in uxorem ? Nunc igitur ecce conjux tua, accipe eam, et vade.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָמָ֤ה אָמַ֙רְתָּ֙ אֲחֹ֣תִי הִ֔וא וָאֶקַּ֥ח אֹתָ֛הּ לִ֖י לְאִשָּׁ֑ה וְעַתָּ֕ה הִנֵּ֥ה אִשְׁתְּךָ֖ קַ֥ח וָלֵֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For what cause didst thou say, she was thy sister, that I might take her to my wife? Now therefore there is thy wife, take her, and go thy way.
verses.finnish_biblia: Miksis sanoit, hän on sisareni? että minä ottaisin hänen emännäkseni? katso tässä on sinun emäntäs, ota häntä ja mene.
verses.king_james: Why saidst thou, She is my sister? so I might have taken her to me to wife: now therefore behold thy wife, take her, and go thy way.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcepitque Pharao super Abram viris : et deduxerunt eum, et uxorem illius, et omnia quæ habebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְצַ֥ו עָלָ֛יו פַּרְעֹ֖ה אֲנָשִׁ֑ים וַֽיְשַׁלְּח֥וּ אֹת֛וֹ וְאֶת־אִשְׁתּ֖וֹ וְאֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁר־לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Pharao gave his men orders concerning Abram: and they led him away and his wife, and all that he had.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Pharao antoi käskyn hänestä miehillensä: ja he saattoivat hänen ulos ja hänen emäntänsä, ja kaikki kuin hänellä oli.
verses.king_james: And Pharaoh commanded his men concerning him: and they sent him away, and his wife, and all that he had.
